buck.def: 公鹿、(口)元、美金、反對、抵抗的人、反對地 (反對)
buck.col: pass the buck (推卸責任), big bucks
buck.ex: He won ten bucks on a lottery ticket.

bucket.def: 水桶、吊桶、大口地喝、傾盆而下、水桶的人、傾盆地 (桶)
bucket.col: bucket list (遺願清單), kick the bucket (死), rain in buckets (大雨如注)
bucket.ex: She filled the bucket with warm soapy water.

bucketful.ex: He threw a bucketful of water over the dirty car.

buckle.def: 扣環、扣住、彎曲、坍塌、扣環的人、彎曲地 (扣)
buckle.col: buckle up (繫好安全帶), buckle under pressure
buckle.ex: He fastened the buckle on his belt.

buckler.ex: The soldier carried a small steel buckler for defense.

buckling.def: 彎曲、變形、扣住的人 (或物) (變)
buckling.ex: The excessive weight caused the buckling of the metal beams.

buckram.def: 硬麻布、僵硬的、僵硬地 (硬)
buckram.ex: Buckram is often used to stiffen the brims of hats.

buckshot.ex: The hunter used buckshot for large game.

buckskin.def: 鹿皮、鹿皮製品、鹿皮色的、鹿皮地 (鹿皮)
buckskin.ex: The traditional jacket was made of soft buckskin.

buckthorn.ex: Sea buckthorn berries are rich in vitamin C.

bucktooth.ex: He was teased as a child for his prominent bucktooth.

buckwheat.ex: Buckwheat pancakes are common in Russian cuisine.

bucolic.def: 牧歌的、鄉村生活的、田園詩、牧人地 (田園)
bucolic.ex: The painting depicts a peaceful, bucolic landscape.

bud.def: 芽、花蕾、萌芽、發展的人、萌芽地 (芽)
bud.col: nip in the bud (防微杜漸), flower bud
bud.ex: The apple trees are starting to produce buds.

buddhism.ex: Buddhism is one of the world's major religions.

buddhist.def: 佛教的、佛教徒、佛教徒的人物、佛教地 (佛教徒)
buddhist.ex: The buddhist monk spent his day in meditation.

buddy.def: (口)好朋友、夥伴、交朋友的人、交朋友地 (好朋友)
buddy.ex: We've been buddies since grade school.

budge.def: 稍微移動、改變主意、移動的人、移動地 (動)
budge.col: won't budge an inch, budge up (挪開)

budgerigar.ex: She kept a pet budgerigar in a colorful cage.

budget.def: 預算、生活費、編制預算、低廉的、預算的人、預算地 (預算)
budget.col: on a tight budget, budget deficit, budget airlines
budget.ex: The government announced its annual budget today.

budgetary.ex: The project was delayed due to budgetary constraints.

budgeting.def: 編制預算、預算的人 (或物) (計)
budgeting.ex: Successful household budgeting requires careful planning.

budgie.ex: The sweet little budgie can mimic a few words.

budding.def: 發芽的、萌芽中的、發芽的人 (或物) (萌)
budding.ex: The school supports the talents of budding artists.

buff.def: 牛皮、米色、愛好者、擦亮、使變黃色、擦亮地 (粉)
buff.col: movie buff, in the buff (赤裸), buff up
buff.ex: The soldier spent hours buffing his boots.

buffalo.def: 水牛、北美野牛、威嚇、困住的人、威嚇地 (水牛)
buffalo.ex: Traditional farmers use water buffalo to plow the fields.

buffer.def: 緩衝器、減震器、緩衝、緩衝的人、緩衝地 (緩衝)
buffer.col: buffer zone, memory buffer, buffer state (緩衝國)
buffer.ex: The digital player uses a memory buffer to prevent skipping.

buffering.ex: The video stopped because of constant buffering.
